title: Hero's Journey
description: A datapack inspired by End Remastered, gather eyes and go to The End!
body:
![Minecraft-style update text that says "Hero's Journey"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f02f7ee0d944350888454c607133c7b70999effa.png)
![All of the eyes added by Hero's Journey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d796e8edfa2ef316a31b7edf570f4737789d8aac.png)

---
### Hero's Journey is a datapack inspired by jack-bagel's [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) mod! There are 16 different eyes to collect littered around the world, you will need to gather 12 different ones to open the end portal and go to The End!

The main intention of this datapack is to encourage players to do things they wouldn't normally do in the game, when was the last time you built a turtle sanctuary?

This datapack does have a resource pack, which adds textures for all 16 eyes! While not required, it is recommended. If you're downloading the mod version, you do not need to install the resource pack! 

**The resource pack is contained within the datapack itself, just drop the whole zip into your game's resource pack folder!**

All available eyes and hints to their locations can be found in this datapack's advancements! If you want more detail, check out the [wiki](https://github.com/maybejake/Heros-Journey/wiki)!

# Compatibility
Hero's Journey **IS** compatible with any datapack that modifies loot tables. This datapack does not modify any loot tables, and inserts the eyes using other methods to maximise compatibility.

This datapack is also compatible with datapacks that modify the stronghold, such as [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds)!

As of v2.0, the eyes added by Hero's Journey are fully data-driven, meaning that other datapacks can add their own eyes!
